detail.description:
Step into the ring and prepare for the ultimate fighting experience! MFC - Midnight Fight Club brings the raw intensity and excitement of professional mixed martial arts fighting right to your fingertips. With unparalleled graphics, a diverse roster of fighters, and realistic physics, this is the mobile fighting game you've been waiting for.
Features:
Dynamic Combat System
Choose from two types of attacks—weak and heavy—to outwit your opponents. Nail the timing, and you could land a devastating
detail.releaseNotes:
- Added Online Mode (Quick March, Private Match)
- Added Haptic vibrations
- Added Training Notifications
- Interface Improvements
- Bug Fixes
